rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified AmbigSQL benchmark reference).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
